RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Both sides stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes)

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DEBORAH CHATMAN's Motion For 1) Ccp 2019.030 Protective Order To Restrict Frequency Or Extent Of Use Of Depositions By Defendants 2) For Monetary Santions Per Ccp2019.030(C) And 3) For Ccp 2023.030 (A) Monetary Sanctions For Misuse Of Discovery Process, In The Alternative.

The motion is Denied. Sanctions are Denied. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) Defendant to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 directly to the Judge Pro Tem Robbins at drobbins@woodrobbins.com.

ARGUED. Mr. Ta defined irrevocable license. Mr. Zacks stated four conditions he is requesting if the court is inclined to grant the motion.
